_comment: FAE-eval fixtures. Each fixture is a GUI-uploadable BOM CSV. 'invariants' are deterministic, datasheet-independent checks the crossref OUTPUT must satisfy for named rows — used by the zero-token golden checker (test_fae_golden_invariants.py) and handed to the FAE judge as ground the customer would also know. 'target' is the manufacturer to cross to.

L1.note: Any substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x of 1.5uH; a 330nH pick is a hard no_substitute, never partial.

R1.note: 47k substitute must be ~47k; a 10k/100k pick is no_substitute.

C1.note: 0.1uF X7R must not be replaced by a Y5V/Z5U class-2-worst part.

C2.note: 220uF bulk; substitute must not lose more than ~20% nominal capacitance.

L2.note: L2 original is Coilcraft XGL5050-153ME (15uH). Any substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x of 15uH; grounded from the identified eval-board inductor.

C12.note: Original GRT155R70J105KE01D is a Murata X7R (temp-char R7); a substitute must not drop below X5R to a Y5V/Z5U class-worst part.

R11.note: Original ERJ-2RKF1003X is a Panasonic 100k 1% (code 1003); substitute must be ~100k.

L1.note: Original XEL4020-222MEC is a Coilcraft 2.2uH (code 222 = 22x10^2 nH); substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x.

C13.note: Original C1005X7R1H104K050BB is an explicit X7R (token in the MPN); substitute must not drop below X5R.

R3.note: Original ERJ-3EKF1003V is a Panasonic 100k 1% (code 1003); substitute must be ~100k.

L1.note: Original XGL6030-222MEC is a Coilcraft 2.2uH (code 222 = 22x10^2 nH); substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x.

C4.note: Original GRM155R71H104KE14 is a Murata X7R (temp-char R7); substitute must not drop below X5R.

R2.note: Original RC0402FR-0747K5L is a Yageo 47.5k 1% (code 47K5); substitute must be ~47.5k.

L1.note: Original XGL4040-152ME is a Coilcraft 1.5uH (code 152 = 15x10^2 nH); substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x.

CBST.note: Original GRM188R71C104K is a Murata X7R (temp-char R7); substitute must not drop below X5R.

R1.note: Original RC0603FR-07100KL is a Yageo 100k 1% (code 100K); substitute must be ~100k.

L1.note: Original XEL4030-472MEB is a Coilcraft 4.7uH (code 472 = 47x10^2 nH); substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x.

L2.note: Original XAL4040-103MEB is a Coilcraft 10uH (code 103 = 10x10^3 nH); substitute must be within 0.8-1.25x.

C13.note: Original C2012X7R1H103K is an explicit X7R (token in the MPN); substitute must not drop below X5R.

R12.note: Original RC0603FR-07100KL is a Yageo 100k 1% (code 100K); substitute must be ~100k.

_design_comment: Reference-design fixtures drive POST /jobs/crossref/from-design: each carries a topology + operating spec + BOM so the pipeline derives per-ref operating-point stress and gates substitutes against the CIRCUIT (the FAE-parity path for null-MPN parts). Kept separate from the BOM-only 'fixtures' above because they exercise a different endpoint.
